languages.text: "Пусть выскажутся соратники. Для многих эта битва может стать последней".

traits.locale_text: "Быть может, стоит дать высказаться соратникам? Для многих достойных эта битва может стать последней".

languages.text: "Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."
languages.original_text: "Пусть выскажутся соратники. Для многих эта битва может стать последней".

traits.locale_text: "Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."
"Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."
"Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."

languages.text: “让您的盟友各抒己见吧。对其中许多人而言，这或许将是最后一战。”
languages.original_text: "Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."

traits.locale_text: “让您的盟友各抒己见吧。对其中许多人而言，这或许将是最后一战。”

languages.text: « Laissez vos alliés donner leur avis. Pour la plupart, cette bataille sera peut-être la dernière. »
languages.original_text: "Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."

traits.locale_text: « Laissez vos alliés donner leur avis. Pour la plupart, cette bataille sera peut-être la dernière. »

languages.text: «Deje hablar a sus aliados. Podría ser la última batalla de muchos de ellos».
languages.original_text: "Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."

traits.locale_text: «Deje hablar a sus aliados. Podría ser la última batalla de muchos de ellos».

languages.text: "Bırakın müttefikler konuşsun. Bu savaş, birçoğunun son savaşı olabilir."
languages.original_text: "Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."

traits.locale_text: "Bırakın müttefikler konuşsun. Bu savaş, birçoğunun son savaşı olabilir."

languages.text: "Lasst Eure Verbündeten zu Wort kommen. Für viele von ihnen könnte dies die letzte Schlacht sein."
languages.original_text: "Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."

traits.locale_text: "Lasst Eure Verbündeten zu Wort kommen. Für viele von ihnen könnte dies die letzte Schlacht sein."

languages.text: 「味方の意見を聞く。彼らにとってこの戦いは最後の戦いになるかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "Let your allies speak their piece. For many of them, this battle could be their last."

traits.locale_text: 「味方の意見を聞く。彼らにとってこの戦いは最後の戦いになるかもしれない。」
